summary: The user sought new ideas for pasta salads and shared their recent cooking experiences, including making chili con carne. They expressed interest in a spicy Southwestern Chicken Pasta Salad and requested a recipe for chipotle ranch dressing, as well as a simple braising recipe for beef or lamb, ultimately deciding to try roasted Brussels sprouts as a side dish for the braised short ribs.
facts: The user recently made a pasta salad with cherry tomatoes, mozzarella, and basil. The user made a big batch of chili con carne last week and had it for lunch and dinner for a few days. The user is experimenting with different cooking techniques, including braising and roasting. The user plans to try the Southwestern Chicken Pasta Salad with chipotle ranch dressing. The user is looking for a simple braising recipe for beef or lamb. The user decided to try roasted Brussels sprouts with lemon and garlic as a side dish for the braised short ribs. The user is interested in tips for roasting Brussels sprouts, including ideal temperature and cooking time. The user is looking forward to cooking the braised short ribs and roasted Brussels sprouts.
